title: Cheletons - Chicken Skeletons
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/doDSFAeg/images/d869c82fa5e3173b38a6b4509553738d68358ad9.png)

### All hail the Cheleton
There are three ways to obtain a Cheleton:
1. Naming it `Cheleton`
2. Naming it `Chicken`
3. A 15% chance of it spawning naturally in your world

__PLEASE NOTE: You will need OptiFine installed__

Make sure you have CEM (Custom Entity Models), and Random Entities enabled.

### Project Compatibility
As of 1.19.3, OptiFine versions now support true Random Entity Models. This allows this pack to be fully compatible alongside other resourcepacks!
